query:
UPDATE profiles SET
            name          = COALESCE($1, name),
            age           = COALESCE($2, age),
            gender        = COALESCE($3, gender),
            weekly_km     = COALESCE($4::float4, weekly_km),
            running_years = COALESCE($5, running_years),
            updated_at    = NOW()
        WHERE user_id = $6
